citations.excerpt: Applicant describes financial hardship due to insufficient SAAS bursary to cover Edinburgh accommodation costs.
citations.quote: I am currently a nursing student in Edinburgh and I receive a bursary from the Student Awards Agency Scotland (SAS). While this support helps, it does not cover the full cost of accommodation and living expenses in Edinburgh.

citations.excerpt: Monthly income from SAAS bursary is £770.
citations.quote: my only source of income is my saas bursary which is 770GBP.

citations.excerpt: Applicant commutes 4 hours each way from Glasgow due to inability to afford Edinburgh accommodation.
citations.quote: I live at home in Glasgow and commute to Edinburgh for my studies. This journey takes me almost four hours each way.

citations.excerpt: RA applications open for 2026/27 academic year.
citations.quote: Resident Assistant applications for 2026/27 are now open!

citations.excerpt: RA role offers 55% rent reduction as a scholarship.
citations.quote: Each RA receives a scholarship that reduces their rent by 55%.

findings.text: Anfal Elbushra's hardship fund application shows monthly SAAS bursary of £770 and accommodation costs of £972, creating a shortfall.
Applicant commutes 4 hours each way from Glasgow due to inability to afford Edinburgh accommodation.
RA applications for 2026/27 opened March 2026, offering 55% rent reduction; deadline 12 April 2026.
The RA rent reduction opportunity may be relevant to mitigating future arrears, but it is unclear if the applicant applied or was eligible.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## RA Application Relevance Assessment

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0046 (RA Recruitment Email, 9 March 2026)

**Key Details:**
- RA applications for 2026/27 opened on 9 March 2026, deadline 12 April 2026.
- RA role offers a 55% rent reduction scholarship.
- The email was sent to all residents of Napier University Student Accommodation.

**Relevance to Arrears Mitigation:**
- If Anfal Elbushra was a resident at the time, she would have received this email.
- Applying and being selected as an RA could have reduced her rent by 55%, potentially alleviating the financial shortfall.
- It is currently unknown whether she applied or was eligible.

**Recommendation:**
- Confirm whether Anfal Elbushra applied for the RA position.
- If not, consider whether this opportunity was reasonably available and whether failure to apply affects mitigation arguments.
proposed_artifacts.title: RA Application Relevance Assessment

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search matter sources and communications for any evidence that Anfal Elbushra applied for or expressed interest in the Resident Assistant position for 2026/27. Check email records, application forms, or correspondence with Reslife@napier.ac.uk. If no evidence found, flag as unknown.
proposed_tasks.title: Check if Anfal Elbushra applied for RA position

redaction_flags.text: NAP-SRC-0009 contains personal financial details (bank name, balance, account holder name) that may need redaction.

risk_flags.text: If the RA opportunity was available but not pursued, it could weaken a mitigation argument regarding inability to pay.
The hardship application may contain personal data requiring redaction before use in formal complaint.
Staleness not flagged, but source dates are not verified; timeliness of evidence should be confirmed.

summary: NAP-SRC-0009 is a completed hardship fund application by Anfal Elbushra showing SAAS bursary of £770/month, rent £972/month, and a commuting hardship narrative. NAP-SRC-0046 is a March 2026 RA recruitment email offering 55% rent reduction. The RA opportunity postdates the application and may be relevant to mitigation. Full source text is verified; no contradictions found. Proposed follow-up: assess RA application relevance to arrears mitigation.

uncertainties.text: It is unknown whether Anfal Elbushra applied for the RA position or met eligibility criteria.
The outcome of the hardship fund application (NAP-SRC-0009) is not stated in the source.
The source text for NAP-SRC-0009 is truncated; full document may contain additional relevant details.
